---
description: "Compare and rank multiple job offers side by side. 10-dimension scoring matrix with weighted analysis. Use when user has 2+ evaluated offers to compare."
agent: "agent"
tools: [read, web]
---

# Compare Offers

Read the full comparison instructions from `modes/ofertas.md` and execute them.

## 10-Dimension Scoring Matrix:

| Dimension | Weight |
|-----------|--------|
| North Star alignment | 25% |
| CV match | 15% |
| Level fit | 15% |
| Compensation | 10% |
| Growth trajectory | 10% |
| Remote quality | 5% |
| Company reputation | 5% |
| Tech stack | 5% |
| Time to offer | 5% |
| Culture signals | 5% |

Read existing evaluation reports from `reports/` for the offers being compared. Output a ranked comparison with recommendation.
